positive: A maximalist, stylized representation of a cosmic forest. The scene features glowing, ethereal flora and fauna set against a deep indigo and stardust background. Dominant elements include bioluminescent mushroom clusters, stylized alien trees with glowing veins, and gracefully floating nebulae forming the landscape. The composition is symmetrical and highly detailed, suitable for a central print repeat. Use a vibrant, highly contrasted color palette of electric blues, neon magenta, turquoise, and gold accents. Cinematic, vaporwave aesthetic, perfect for apparel printing, clean silhouettes, high contrast graphic art, vector illustration quality, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, low quality, noisy, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, dull, bokeh
